script:
set +e
echo '=== /home/azureuser top-level: bots + responders ==='
ls /home/azureuser/ 2>&1 | grep -E '(bot|responder|send-to)' | head -40
echo '=== /home/azureuser/.*-bot dirs ==='
ls -d /home/azureuser/.*-bot 2>/dev/null
echo '=== running services right now ==='
systemctl list-units --type=service --state=running --no-legend --no-pager 2>&1 | grep -E '(bot|responder)\.service' | head -50
echo '=== aixa specifically ==='
ls -la /home/azureuser/aixa* 2>&1
ls -la /home/azureuser/.aixa* 2>&1
echo '=== last 3 lines mskai outbound just to confirm proxy works ==='
tail -3 /home/azureuser/.mskai-bot/outbound.jsonl 2>&1 | head -3
echo '===END==='
